review_title: RECOMENDED APPLICATION FOR YOUR GYMS
author: ginda R.
pros: this is easy application to use because it can help me to manage the teacher's schedule of workout!!
cons: there are no problems inside the application and i use it well
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Best Gym Owner App on the Market
description: It is an easy-to-use and modify application for any gym.
author: Jeff L.
pros: Gymdesk took me 2 days to fully set up for my new gym. As I grew and needed to change and adapt certain aspects, I could do it on the computer or from the app in a matter of minutes. When I had a question about merging clients, they were super responsive and gave easy instructions.
cons: I like it all. I have not had any issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Usable but I would recommend different gym software
description: Gymdesk runs and works in the many essential areas but there are many obvious flaws
author: Ryan Q.
pros: Nice looking interface, easy to use dashboard. Very easy initial set up compared to a competitor service I was also using. Many things just work. Staff responds to problems quickly enough for what I imagine is a small company, but the company doesnt have the resources to continue development to deal with what I feel are obvious issues.
cons: Very few customization options. No integrated parent/guardian option on sign up forms and waivers (has to be done custom), which for software catering to martial arts businesses is a little ridiculous. Cumbersome to set up document and membership options and difficult to individualize membership options outside of the template you've created (although you can discount or add signup fees, etc). Students uploading profile pictures from all webcams come out with wrong aspect ratio and make my business look unprofessional. Cannot disable capchas on signup forms (among other elements that cannot be customized). Essential membership documents are not required to be signed right away and add an extra step for staff that can easily be missed when I feel the software should be able to automate this task.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Gymdesk Feedback
description: Excellent. We have over 200 clients and all love how easy the information is available
author: Adam P.
pros: Ease of access for information to clients
cons: More customizable options for testing/promotion
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Roots Mixed Martial Arts review
description: 9/10 love everything about the software, it’s helping us grow rapidly!
author: Sean M.
pros: We love everything about it other than the website builder. Managing leads, students, emails, waivers, pretty much whatever has been super easy..
cons: Our only issue with website builder is that it downgrades our quality of photos and images don’t fit properly and are not scale able to fit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Awesome software
description: Awesome software. Everyone finds it easy to use. No real complaints at all.
author: Matthew D.
pros: Easy to use, logical UI, helpful staff. It's very enjoyable, and leagues ahead of the others I tried.
cons: Checking in history isn't saved.. I guess if you use the front desk app it might, but that's a whole load of overhead for us. Also seem to have 2 waivers being signed sometimes somehow, dunno how or why there are two 😄
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Taylored Body
author: Andrea T.
pros: User friendly and only what I need, nothing too complicated
cons: Would be great to have a texting platform that can be used from a phone app on the business side. And a general business management app. Also- programming that you're able to write for each individual member rather than linking a program to a specific membership.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great value and great service
description: I was able to get setup extremely quickly and make it work for our use case. I evaluated many other vendors and GymDesk was one of the only ones that didn't lock me into a proprietary payment processor/hardware, didn't require implementation fees or contracts, and was very transparent and affordable with pricing.
author: Logan B.
pros: The onboarding and live support was fantastic. I was truly impressed with everyone I interacted with and the company's willingness to take my feedback. I also love the fact the there's no implementation fees or contracts.
cons: The platform is a bit restrictive, would be great to have more flexibility in the configuration and customizations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Small to medium gyms highly recommend.
description: Very good, streamlined everything so far. Daunting task of a new gym, kids members, uniforms and sales all simplified with gym desk.
author: Jerry S.
pros: Simple, easy to use platform. No crashes, lagging or interruptions between client and gym. Underestimated this software, worth the price.
cons: We are using our own website portal which means another cost for us but have not had enough experience with the provided website to use yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Gymdesk is my hero as a small business owner!
description: Can’t complain, highly recommend using the software for businesses
author: Kyle R.
pros: Attendance tracking and signing up new members at my bjj academy, all the students love using the app and checking in to class is seamless.
cons: Need to be able to add videos to content just for members
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent! Highly Effective Gym Management Tool!!
description: Overall, I am VERY happy with the decision to begin using GymDesk for our membership management. It is easy for us and our members, the price is very reasonable, and the value is DEFINITELY there!
author: Paul S.
pros: We struggled to find an effective tool for tracking our members, memberships, and leads within a single tool. The ability to input leads and walk through the onboarding process with them and follow them through to membership and renewals has been a game-changer for our administrative functions. Additionally, the ease with which we were able to integrate our existing payment processing systems has been nice (since we don't need to get multiple processors). The website templating is also a nice tool. We are not particularly skilled at making and managing websites, so having this template has been super nice. Well done!
cons: There are only a couple of tools that don't have quite the robustness that I would like. Specifically, the skills tracking tool is a great idea, but I would like to be able to customize it a little bit more that I can now.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Gymdesk Review
description: Great so far, customer supper is excellent!
author: Anna H.
pros: Modern interface and features are good. Many automations available which is also great.
cons: I find the main navigation and page navigation could be simplified and made a little better for the user experience - but still better than all other softwares! Some issues with setting up family-plan flat-rate pricing for limited class memberships.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Triple Seven Jiu Jitsu - Ventura, Ca.
description: So far it has been Great! I would just like to be able to call and get a question answered.
author: Matthew P.
pros: I liked the Convenience and Price of Gymdesk.
cons: Not being able to speak on the phone directly to customer service.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Excellent software to manage a martial arts school
description: I don't have to manually keep tabs on when students need to pay. It's much easier to have the system remind them rather than me. I like that fact that I can run the website, billing, attendance, and marketing all in one system!
author: Michael C.
pros: The system is very straightforward and not difficult to learn. The support is fantastic. Any questions I had were addressed in a very timely manner. The price is right for a small martial arts school to be able to save time managing the business side of running a school.
cons: Overall, the software is great but some a couple more customizations would be nice. Being able to customize the dashboard to display what is most important to the administrator. More customization on the website. Example, being able to change the link "Book" on the schedule to something else like "Free Trial Class". I use the booking function for leads rather than students. The check in screen can also be a little easier. Possibly have student names listed that are able to check in to next session available so they can just click on it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Martial Arts Specific Software We've Used, Exceptional Customer Service
description: The customer service with MAonRails has been fantastic. Eran goes out of his way to help and answers quickly. They were also willing to work with us on price which for a small school is greatly appreciated.
author: Leigh-Ann M.
pros: The interface is clean, easy to navigate for students and administrator. Easy to customize and get up and running quickly. Like the family account feature, belt ranks are easy to create, add, and modify. Customer Service is fantastic, quick answers and always willing to help.
cons: That each document cannot have a customizable email saved. A bit difficult to navigate belt ranks when different classes can count towards time in grade. Also, the gym schedule is not great. Would like to see a month at a time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Gymdesk is a must have for serious business owners!
description: Satisfying! The company has put a lot of effort into creating this and working with business owners.
author: Cameron P.
pros: Gymdesk fits all of our business needs for tracking memberships, hosting a website and communicating with clients - it is extremely user friendly and customer service is on point!
cons: There are no significant cons. I understand it's a product that is undergoing constant adjustments in conjunction with user feedback.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice GOS.
description: Overall, we use it, it works well.We wish it would hook up to our website and to our scheduling system.A lot better.
author: Angelo C.
pros: It's fairly easy to use, and it has a lot of good information.
cons: It does not interact very well with websites and facebook and instagram interlinking.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great product
description: Fantastic really. We really jumped feet first when deciding to take over a gym with very little prior experience with back-end knowledge and this program really made it so much easier.
author: Laurel F.
pros: We love how Gymdesk makes life so much easier for our business. The overall look of the program is great and the functionality of it has exceeded our expectations. Customer service has been excellent to work with any time we run into a snag.
cons: We would like to be able to schedule members in "spots" in class (like movie theater or plane seating) to incentivize early booking for classes. It would help us be better prepared and discourage last minute booking.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A must have for gyms and studios training students.
description: Overall this really help boost your dreams. Getting this software management application is a must have, even when starting up!
author: Andre de Wit K.
pros: Effortless and easy for management of your school as a manager. Easy process for your students to sign up .
cons: I would like to have an application (App) on my mobile via Google Play, or AppStore. No complaints.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: An amazing powerful modern program that does what is is supposed to!
description: Overall this software saved me a lot of money and clients due to it's ease of use in money transactions
author: Bobby D.
pros: The ease of use and ability to adapt to my gyms needs is amazing. With the added bonus of communication portals to my clients, text and email this is a powerful tool!
cons: I wish the content page had more of a social media feel and less old web 1.0 feel.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for the price
author: Seamus K.
pros: Very customizable and full of neat and useful features. Attendance tracking, session allotment, booking are all done really well. Friendly and clean UI. If I wanted to do what I'm doing on Gymdesk on Mindbody (or other big names), I'd probably spend double and with more headaches. There are some features that could be added (like an IOS app!) and some that could be more intuitive, but the Gymdesk team is very responsive and helpful, so I'm sure that regardless of your studio's style of doing things they could help calibrate the software to your situation. All-in-all, great software and major bang for your buck.
cons: 1. Sometimes the sign-up page will glitch out or be clunky, which can be embarrassing when dealing with a client. 2. Although it isn't the job of the software to do your math, I do wish there were more numbers that tracked different info about leads, demographics, attendance, new/old/returning students, and accounting stuff like revenue growth, average spent per student, number of paid/unpaid per month, etc. 3. To my knowledge, there is no easy way to upgrade or downgrade memberships. You have to manually cancel their current membership, add the other one, and then figure out the prorated difference (which can be somewhat confusing, especially on the fly). 4. No app, which is fine, but it is definitely easier to use the software on the computer than on the Ipad or phone.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Best Martial Arts Software out there!
description: I had started with a competing product and while it kind of did what I needed it was just... meh. I switched to GymDesk and could not be any happier - it does exactly what I was looking for in a school management software at a very reasonable price!
author: Kris M.
pros: - Easy to use - One stop shop - the creators have thought of everything - Simple for members - Website is connected directly to the back end which is connected to the online shop and Point of Sale which keeps everything simple
cons: - Would like a little more flexibility on the Design templates for the website - Sometimes the help can be a little tricky to navigate but jumping on the Live Chat solves things in minutes!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Client management software for martial arts
description: We needed client management software for our martial arts gym; I switched to MA on Rails based on the recommendation of another gym owner. The author has been incredibly responsive about small changes we needed. Overall, it does what we need well and with a simple, clean interface.
author: Cindy G.
pros: It is simple to use and handles all our needs (managing clients, gym shop sales, attendance, scheduling). It's very flexible about types of membership options, from drop-ins to monthly. I like that the clients can access their own account. It has good tracking for attendance, bill paying, lets us freeze clients when needed. It also has a basic web-site.
cons: The attendance check-in is a bit confusing when you have multiple classes running.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Makes My Life So Much Easier
description: Using Martial Arts on the Rails has made my life much easier. With the last management software I was using I had to spend hours on the phone and honestly just dreaded going in to the gym to work on the computer. I now have a lot more confidence in the way that I am managing the business, our programs and our memberships and I am more organized.
author: Molly S.
pros: I have found that this software is easy to use. It is pretty intuitive as how to navigate through the system. It is easy to add, cancel and manage memberships. I like the simplicity of running attendance and financial reports. I have found the support to be great, I always get a quick response. I also like how it is easy for me as an owner to control what kind of access my other gym staff has access to.
cons: The only one thing I have found that I have had trouble with is when I search for a member if they are frozen their name doesn't come up in the search. I have to go to the frozen tab to find them.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Transformed our Club
description: Prior to using Martial Arts On Rails we operated a manual system and as a consequence we were losing track of payments, grading, etc. For our club to continue to grow and provide the type of service our students deserve we did some extensive research of automated systems and opted for Manonrails as we found it to be a feature rich system which not only manages the basics very well but also allows you to monitor trends and provides a variety of metrics on the clubs performance and tools to help you grow the club. The sytem was created and managed by CEO who himself is a Martial Artist and therefore uniquely understands the needs of a martial arts club. In the event of any issues or queries the responsiveness of their customer support is nothing short of exceptional, we are on a different time zone here in Europe but that has never been an issue. Maonrails has totally transformed how we manage our clubs and we would have no hesitation in recommending them!
author: Sebastiao T.
pros: Ease of day to day use...Does not need additional hardware (works off a smartphone, tablet, pc, etc).... Feature rich... Dashboard providing a snapshot of key metrics...
cons: Nil - anytime we have identified a new feature that would benefit our club they have modified they system to add the desired feature.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
